# DRAFT CLASSIFICATION — Librarian proposes at ingest; human promotes to main frontmatter at classification.
# Values must come from the controlled vocabularies in 00-meta/04-reference/.
_proposed_classification:
  study_design:        # see study_design vocabulary

# ENRICHMENT — Librarian-maintained; never edit manually. Stable IDs are auto-promoted to
# main frontmatter on enrichment; derived metrics and taxonomy terms stay in this namespace.
_enrichment:
  # Citation metrics
  citation_count:
  influential_citation_count:
  scite_supporting:
  scite_contrasting:
  scite_mentioning:
  scite_checked_date:
  # Taxonomy (auto-populated from APIs)
  mesh_terms: []          # PubMed (authoritative for health papers)
  acm_concepts: []        # ACM Digital Library (authoritative for CS/HCI papers)
  openalex_concepts: []   # OpenAlex (covers both domains; lower precision)
  # Discovery
  oa_pdf_url:
  related_papers: []      # Semantic Scholar recommendations + OpenAlex refs
